objects.name: BranchNamePatternParameters
objects.description: Parameters to be used for the branch_name_pattern rule.

fields.name: name
fields.description: How this rule will appear to users.

fields.name: negate
fields.description: If true, the rule will fail if the pattern matches.

fields.name: operator
fields.description: The operator to use for matching.

fields.name: pattern
fields.description: The pattern to match with.

fields.name: allowsDeletions
fields.description: Can this branch be deleted.

fields.name: allowsForcePushes
fields.description: Are force pushes allowed on this branch.

fields.name: blocksCreations
fields.description: Is branch creation a protected operation.

fields.name: branchProtectionRuleConflicts
fields.description: A list of conflicts matching branches protection rule and other branch protection rules.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

fields.name: bypassForcePushAllowances

arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

fields.name: creator
fields.description: The actor who created this branch protection rule.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: dismissesStaleReviews
fields.description: Will new commits pushed to matching branches dismiss pull request review approvals.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the BranchProtectionRule object.

fields.name: isAdminEnforced
fields.description: Can admins override branch protection.

fields.name: lockAllowsFetchAndMerge
fields.description: Whether users can pull changes from upstream when the branch is locked. Set to true to allow fork syncing. Set to false to prevent fork syncing.

fields.name: lockBranch
fields.description: Whether to set the branch as read-only. If this is true, users will not be able to push to the branch.

fields.name: matchingRefs
fields.description: Repository refs that are protected by this rule.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Filters refs with query on name.

fields.name: pattern
fields.description: Identifies the protection rule pattern.

fields.name: pushAllowances
fields.description: A list push allowances for this branch protection rule.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

fields.name: repository
fields.description: The repository associated with this branch protection rule.

fields.name: requireLastPushApproval
fields.description: Whether the most recent push must be approved by someone other than the person who pushed it.

fields.name: requiredApprovingReviewCount
fields.description: Number of approving reviews required to update matching branches.

fields.name: requiredDeploymentEnvironments
fields.description: List of required deployment environments that must be deployed successfully to update matching branches.

fields.name: requiredStatusCheckContexts
fields.description: List of required status check contexts that must pass for commits to be accepted to matching branches.

fields.name: requiredStatusChecks
fields.description: List of required status checks that must pass for commits to be accepted to matching branches.

fields.name: requiresApprovingReviews
fields.description: Are approving reviews required to update matching branches.

fields.name: requiresCodeOwnerReviews
fields.description: Are reviews from code owners required to update matching branches.

fields.name: requiresCommitSignatures
fields.description: Are commits required to be signed.

fields.name: requiresConversationResolution
fields.description: Are conversations required to be resolved before merging.

fields.name: requiresDeployments
fields.description: Does this branch require deployment to specific environments before merging.

fields.name: requiresLinearHistory
fields.description: Are merge commits prohibited from being pushed to this branch.

fields.name: requiresStatusChecks
fields.description: Are status checks required to update matching branches.

fields.name: requiresStrictStatusChecks
fields.description: Are branches required to be up to date before merging.

fields.name: restrictsPushes
fields.description: Is pushing to matching branches restricted.

fields.name: restrictsReviewDismissals
fields.description: Is dismissal of pull request reviews restricted.

fields.name: reviewDismissalAllowances
fields.description: A list review dismissal allowances for this branch protection rule.

objects.name: RefNameConditionTarget
objects.description: Parameters to be used for the ref_name condition.

fields.name: exclude
fields.description: Array of ref names or patterns to exclude. The condition will not pass if any of these patterns match.

fields.name: include
fields.description: Array of ref names or patterns to include. One of these patterns must match for the condition to pass. Also accepts ~DEFAULT_BRANCH to include the default branch or ~ALL to include all branches.

objects.name: RequiredStatusCheckDescription
objects.description: Represents a required status check for a protected branch, but not any specific run of that check.

fields.name: app
fields.description: The App that must provide this status in order for it to be accepted.

fields.name: context
fields.description: The name of this status.

objects.name: RequiredStatusChecksParameters
objects.description: Choose which status checks must pass before the ref is updated. When enabled, commits must first be pushed to another ref where the checks pass.

fields.name: doNotEnforceOnCreate
fields.description: Allow repositories and branches to be created if a check would otherwise prohibit it.

fields.name: requiredStatusChecks
fields.description: Status checks that are required.

fields.name: strictRequiredStatusChecksPolicy
fields.description: Whether pull requests targeting a matching branch must be tested with the latest code. This setting will not take effect unless at least one status check is enabled.

objects.name: ReviewDismissalAllowance
objects.description: A user, team, or app who has the ability to dismiss a review on a protected branch.

fields.name: actor
fields.description: The actor that can dismiss.

fields.name: branchProtectionRule
fields.description: Identifies the branch protection rule associated with the allowed user, team, or app.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the ReviewDismissalAllowance object.

fields.name: edges
fields.description: A list of edges.

fields.name: nodes
fields.description: A list of nodes.

fields.name: pageInfo
fields.description: Information to aid in pagination.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Identifies the total count of items in the connection.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

fields.name: node
fields.description: The item at the end of the edge.

inputFields.description: How this rule will appear to users.

inputFields.description: If true, the rule will fail if the pattern matches.

inputFields.description: The operator to use for matching.

inputFields.description: The pattern to match with.

inputFields.description: Can this branch be deleted.

inputFields.description: A list of User, Team, or App IDs allowed to bypass force push targeting matching branches.

inputFields.description: Whether users can pull changes from upstream when the branch is locked. Set to true to allow fork syncing. Set to false to prevent fork syncing.

inputFields.name: lockBranch
inputFields.description: Whether to set the branch as read-only. If this is true, users will not be able to push to the branch.

inputFields.name: pattern
inputFields.description: The glob-like pattern used to determine matching branches.

inputFields.name: pushActorIds
inputFields.description: A list of User, Team, or App IDs allowed to push to matching branches.

inputFields.name: repositoryId
inputFields.description: The global relay id of the repository in which a new branch protection rule should be created in.

inputFields.name: requireLastPushApproval
inputFields.description: Whether the most recent push must be approved by someone other than the person who pushed it.

inputFields.description: Are commits required to be signed.

inputFields.name: requiresConversationResolution
inputFields.description: Are conversations required to be resolved before merging.

inputFields.name: requiresDeployments
inputFields.description: Are successful deployments required before merging.

inputFields.name: requiresLinearHistory
inputFields.description: Are merge commits prohibited from being pushed to this branch.

inputFields.name: requiresStatusChecks
inputFields.description: Are status checks required to update matching branches.

inputFields.name: requiresStrictStatusChecks
inputFields.description: Are branches required to be up to date before merging.

inputFields.name: base
inputFields.description: The name of the base branch that the provided head will be merged into.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: commitMessage
inputFields.description: Message to use for the merge commit. If omitted, a default will be used.

inputFields.name: head
inputFields.description: The head to merge into the base branch. This can be a branch name or a commit GitObjectID.

inputFields.name: repositoryId
inputFields.description: The Node ID of the Repository containing the base branch that will be modified.

inputFields.name: exclude
inputFields.description: Array of ref names or patterns to exclude. The condition will not pass if any of these patterns match.

inputFields.description: Array of ref names or patterns to include. One of these patterns must match for the condition to pass. Also accepts ~DEFAULT_BRANCH to include the default branch or ~ALL to include all branches.

inputObjects.name: RequiredStatusCheckInput
inputObjects.description: Specifies the attributes for a new or updated required status check.

inputFields.name: appId
inputFields.description: The ID of the App that must set the status in order for it to be accepted. Omit this value to use whichever app has recently been setting this status, or use "any" to allow any app to set the status.

inputFields.name: context
inputFields.description: Status check context that must pass for commits to be accepted to the matching branch.
